description_long: This kiosk features a compact, rectangular structure with a flat, overhanging roof that provides shade and shelter. The main body is constructed from solid, gray panels, with lighter-colored surfaces forming the counter and roof edges. The front side includes an open service window beneath the roof, flanked by vertical supports, and a recessed entryway below. The rear and side panels are solid, offering privacy and security, while the base sits on a light-colored, tiled platform that extends beyond the kiosk's footprint. The overall design is functional and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks or parks.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with a flat overhanging roof, solid gray panels, and a front service window set on a tiled platform.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open service window, recessed entryway, and overhanging roof.
description_view_1: Rear view displays solid gray panels with no openings or windows, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_2: Side view reveals the solid side panel and the extension of the tiled platform, with the counter edge visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the solid panel and platform extension.
attribute_window_presence: One large rectangular service window at the front
attribute_door_configuration: One open archway entry at the front below the service window
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with wide overhangs, light-colored, possibly concrete or composite material
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with functional, clean lines and simple geometric forms
